# Security Policy

## Reporting a Vulnerability

If you find a vulnerability in Wolfstar's codebase please report it immediately.
If you deem the vulnerability exploitable by Wolfstar's users in any shape or form please join the Discord server at https://join.wolfstar.rocks and send a direct message to a maintainer.
In case the vulnerability is not exploitable by Wolfstar's users you are free to either:

- Use the GitHub issue tracker to report the issue
- or join the Discord server through https://join.wolfstar.rocks and use the "#feedback" channel.
- or contact us by email at contact@wolfstar.rocks
